compiled_state.title: dso:onboarding: does not add .tickets-tracker/ or .ui-discovery-cache/ to .prettierignore
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Problem

When onboarding a project that uses Prettier, the dso:onboarding skill does not account for .tickets-tracker/ or .ui-discovery-cache/ directories in the project's .prettierignore file. These directories contain JSON event files and cache data that should not be formatted by Prettier.

## Expected Behavior

dso:onboarding should add .tickets-tracker/ and .ui-discovery-cache/ to .prettierignore (and similar ignore files) during project setup.

## Actual Behavior

These directories are not mentioned in .prettierignore, causing Prettier to attempt formatting on ticket event files and UI discovery cache files.

## Severity

P3 — formatting noise on infrastructure files.

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral — ticket describes onboarding skill behavioral gap AND fix requires editing plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Behavioral assertion (LLM-behavioral exemption): dso:onboarding Step 2c MUST add .tickets-tracker/ and .ui-discovery-cache/ to .prettierignore when project uses Prettier. Current behavior: these dirs omitted from .prettierignore. Expected: both dirs always added.
comments.author: Test
